message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve chinese food and should be in the cheap price range
The restaurant should be in the south
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 12:30 on tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 2 and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has a star of 4
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 2 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
